race.comment: Competitive. SNIP OF GOSSIP (2) progressed nicely last time out to finish just a long neck from the winner over 1705m at Bunbury after being in the firing line on the corner. Well placed with the 3kg claim and he will be tough to beat. ANGEL SHAME (10) is much better than the form line suggests. Posted a good number over 2000m at Pinjarra last time and has winning claims in this grade. SUNNY TIMES (1) has had one blip in a string of solid efforts. Is back in grade and will use the inside barrier. The 3kg claim brings him right into it. ANNA'S BOY (7) is knocking on the door and a 3kg apprentice is aboard. The wide gate needs managing. HOT CHATTER (11) also has an awkward gate but her effort at Belmont last time was good and she also benefits from a 3kg claim.
